purpose: The First-Strike surface: render the generated skeleton product.md inline, document-style, stamped with provenance — where event:shaping.artifact-generated fires for the first time. Read-only; refinement lives downstream in the product workspace.

contains.text-intent: The shaped product's name — the anchor's title, generated from the fuzzy idea
Provenance stamp: what generated this skeleton and when, marking it as an actionable spec rather than magic (required — no provenance-free output)
Generated ideal-user cut; where the idea under-specifies it, an open question is shown instead of a fabricated value (the treatment — inline marker vs gathered list — is a deferred open question)
Section label: Job to be done
Generated JTBD statement, or an open question where the idea gave nothing to work with
Generated first-cut differentiation — a deliberate first cut, not the full MOAT (Intermediate depth is kept off this screen)
Move forward into the full artifact tree where refinement and repeat generation (PAI/KUI) happen — the intended post-aha move
Symmetric low-friction return to the dashboard retention surface
